issues.description: deliverable_d_prices has no DSN/live command path. CLI: fixture | audit-fixture | audit-file only. Cannot produce real market price references from PostgreSQL until wired + comparable observations present. Fail-closed honesty held (no fabrication).
issues.recommendation: Follow-up: add live/from-dsn command that maps datalake price/contract observations into PriceObservation with explicit value_semantic; keep INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE when n < min_sample; never invent prices from empty DSN.

issues.description: audit_report insufficient_sample check uses `has_insuff_mark = any(...) or True`, making the presence branch always pass. Real enforcement is insuff_ok + unit/fixture paths.
issues.recommendation: Remove `or True`; optionally assert that when any panel has n < min_sample it is marked INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE (bidirectional).

issues.description: DoD wording 'cada valor' is estimado|homologado|contratado|pago; panel JSON exposes set of semantics present, not a per-observation semantic list in the panel payload.
issues.recommendation: Optional: export observations[] with value_semantic per row in panel when producing operational reports; mechanism already stores semantic on PriceObservation.

residual_risks: Live path not wired to DSN — mechanism proven on fixture only; real SC price panel requires datalake wiring + comparable observations
audit_report has_insuff_mark always True (or True) — weak presence check; behavior still covered by unit tests + fixture
value_semantics_present is group aggregate, not per-value column in panel JSON
Fixture prices are synthetic (schema proof), not real market references

may_flip_dod_conditions: PO accepts residual LIVE-PATH-NOT-WIRED (mechanism claim, not live market price population claim)
Flip narrative must state fixture/schema proof + fail-closed rules; must NOT claim live SC market price panel from PG
Must not claim values as 'preço real praticado'
Optional: keep open until live path if PO wants operational market evidence before [x]
gate_decision.reason: All 12 DoD D audit checks PASS on fixture; INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE for small n held; outliers flagged not hidden (min/max keep extremes); no 'preço real praticado' label path; invalid semantics rejected; tests map 1:1; process order correct (DoD unchecked before QA). Residuals (live DSN, audit or-True, group-level semantics) are documented honesty debt, not AC failures of the mechanism slice.
gate_decision.po_guidance: Authorized to flip L234-245 with residual narrative OR defer flip until live path. Do not claim live market prices. QA did not flip DoD.
gate_decision.recommended_dod_action: PO decision: flip with residual LIVE-PATH-NOT-WIRED note, or leave open until DSN path ships
